# Aldridge & Charles Marine

> A private marine office providing bespoke yacht stewardship to a closed roster of principals. Discreet, retained, by introduction.

Aldridge & Charles Marine (ACMarine) is a privately held firm offering four practices for owners of significant vessels: yacht management, brokerage and acquisition, refit and project oversight, and crew and concierge services.

## Practices

- [Yacht Management](https://acmarine.com/#services): Flag, finance, compliance, crew. Acting as the principal's shoreside office.
- [Brokerage & Acquisition](https://acmarine.com/#services): Off-market vessels, sea trials, surveys, considered purchases.
- [Refit & Project Oversight](https://acmarine.com/#services): Owner's representative shipyard-side from start to launch.
- [Crew & Concierge](https://acmarine.com/#services): Captains, chefs, provisioning, berths, customs, transit support.

## Approach

- One principal, one director, one telephone number.
- Paid by retainer. No referral fees. No kickbacks.
- Roster closed for most of the year. Introductions only.
- Offices in Monaco, Antibes, Newport, and Seattle.

## Contact

- Email: office@acmarine.com
- Site: https://acmarine.com/

## Optional

- [Approach](https://acmarine.com/#approach): The founding principles and how the office operates.
- [Enquire](https://acmarine.com/#contact): Written introductions to the office.
